incoming.title: No incoming requests
incoming.description: When someone wants to borrow your items, their requests will appear here.

outgoing.title: No outgoing requests
outgoing.description: Request to borrow items from other users to see them here.

active.title: No active loans
active.description: Accepted borrow requests will appear here until the item is returned.

requestBorrow.title: Request to borrow?
requestBorrow.message: The owner will be notified of your request for "{{itemName}}".

accept.title: Accept request?
accept.message: The item will be marked as loaned to {{name}}.

decline.title: Decline request?
decline.message: The requester will be notified that their request was declined.

cancel.title: Cancel request?
cancel.message: Your borrow request for "{{itemName}}" will be cancelled.

markReturned.title: Mark as returned?
markReturned.message: The item will be marked as returned and available again.
